calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-21-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: ARNOLD EVJE FOR PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY; AIMEE GANZ PROPERTY MANAGER FOR SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
TRINA RODERICK FOR DEFENDANT YURIY KHESIN, ALSO PRESENT, WITH RUSSIAN INTERPRETER TATIANA IACOPA

CASE SETTLED. PARTIES PLACED STIPULATION TO ENTER JUDGMENT ON THE RECORD.
1. DEFENDANT ADMITS BEHAVIOR ON 7/4/04 INAPPROPRIATE
2. DEFENDANT TO REFRAIN FROM INAPPROPRIATE BEHAVIOR IN FUTURE
3. HOUSING AUTHORITY TO PLACE DEFENDANT ON PRIORITY LIST FOR TRANSFER AND PROVIDE DEFENDANT DOCUMENTATION OF STATUS.
4. DEFENDANT TO REFRAIN FROM DISTURBING ANY PERSONS ON PREMISES
5. DEFENDANT TO REFRAIN FROM CAUSING DAMAGE TO/ON PROPERTY
6. DEFENDANT TO PAY COST OF REPAIR TO HOUSING AUTHORITY ON PAYMENT PLAN OR ARRANGE THIRD PARTY TO DO REPAIR.
7. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY $434 BACK RENT ON OR BEFORE 10/1/04.
8. DEFENDANT WILL COMMUNICATE WITH HOUSING AUTHORITY EMPLOYEES ONLY IN PRENENCE OF SOCIAL WORKER OR AUTHORIZED REPRESENTATIVE.
9. NO ONE ELSE TO LIVE IN PREMISES
IF ANY OF THESE CONDITIONS ARE BREACHED BY DEFENDANT HOUSING AUTHORITY IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION OF UNIT. DEFENDANT WAIVES THE RIGHT TO APPLY FOR STAY OF EXECUTION OR TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT. BOTH SIDES TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATTORNEY FEES.
JUDGE PRO TEM: BARBARA ANSCHER; CLERK: JEANIE DOBBS AND BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER:BELDON YEE; BAILIFF: FRED DAYDAN
(218)
